# Listen first. Then, keep thinking

A personal injury lawyer with zero coding background won the Claude Code Global hackathon, then took CrossBeam — an AI permit review system — to production city pilots. Every feature traces to a recorded conversation with a domain expert. The "listen first" method for knowing what to build.
